markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive with John Habib to gather insights on Diligent's content strategy, focusing on SMB vs. enterprise audiences and product details.](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent is targeting SMBs and enterprises separately, with "transaction readiness" as a key message for SMBs](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Board management/governance solutions are the priority for content strategy, starting small and scaling with customer growth](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Content review process will involve John's team, with a focus on maintaining a professional yet humanized tone for SMB audience](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Opportunity to refresh older content and improve internal linking for better SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)

## Topics

### SMB vs. Enterprise Content Strategy

  - [Separate targeting due to different pain points and governance maturity levels](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [SMB focus: "transaction readiness" message, adapting enterprise content](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Enterprise content performing well: corporate secretary job, general counsel checklists](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Challenge: Defining the right story for why SMBs should care about governance](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

### Product and Sales Approach

  - [No self-serve option currently; demo request process being streamlined](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Pricing not disclosed publicly; new packages created for SMBs](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [White-glove implementation service historically offered, may be changing for smaller packages](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Common objections: price perception, board adoption concerns, implementation time](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)

### Content Performance and Pipeline Attribution

  - [Checklists, buyer's guides, and PDF content historically perform well](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Experimenting with video content, open to new formats](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Attribution tracked via Tableau (last-touch), challenges in measuring content contribution](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)

### Content Review and Guidelines

  - [John's team to review refreshed and new content initially](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Aim for professional yet humanized tone for SMB audience](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)
  - [Current writing guidelines are vague; opportunity to develop more specific guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [Open to testing AI-generated illustrations for blog imagery](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2562.0)

### Technical Setup

  - [Using Atlas platform connecting to various AI models (Claude, SEMrush, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2442.0)
  - [Notion used for file sharing and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share artifacts (writing guidelines, personas) with John for review](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Follow up on Slack for product marketer's email contact](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Conduct site audit for content pruning and refresh opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Upload visual guidelines to Notion for GrowthX team review](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
  - [Explore AI-generated illustration options for blog imagery](https://fathom.video/share/PG_snxWfpiWKDUWzxzfXPgfWrTL8rgrK?tab=summary&timestamp=2538.0)
